title: Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection (comics)
content:
{{Top|rwm|italics=1}}
{{Youmay|the [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] series|[[Hasbro]]'s ''[[Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection]]'' toy line}}
'''''Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection''''' was a limited series of comics that was released monthly from [[2007]] to [[2008]]. They consisted of hardcover versions of the best [[Dark Horse Comics|Dark Horse]] [[Star Wars comic books|TPBs]]. They were available only through [[Wikipedia:Direct Market|Direct Market]] outlets, and each volume was limited to initial orders with no reprints.

==Media==
{{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection (comics)}}
